text: While research-policy dialogues are often described at the national and EU level, knowledge about city level policy-making and the extent to which local policymakers and researchers interact with each other is rare. This chapter investigates forms, topics and the application of research-policy dialogues in European cities and consequently analyses the relation between city-level research-policy dialogues and national level policies, as well as the EU’s role in facilitating the horizontal transfer of best practices between European cities. It appears that it is in particular the EU that has had a facilitating role in the horizontal transfer of best practices through the provision of research funding and the creation of networks of European cities.
